ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the sensor is attached to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "ax" REAL /* Acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "ay" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "az" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "gx" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the X-axis */,
  "gy" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the Y-axis */,
  "gz" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the Z-axis */,
  "gx_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of gyroscope reading in the X-axis */,
  "gy_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of gyroscope reading in the Y-axis */,
  "gz_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of gyroscope reading in the Z-axis */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of each sensor reading */,
  "output" INTEGER /* Output classification of the sensor data (e.g., 1 for normal operation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the machine (e.g., Production Line 1) */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Production line ID for each machine */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the machine (e.g., CNC, Lathe) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., Operational, Under Maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "machine_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES machine_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES machine_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Production Line 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine type (e.g., CNC, Lathe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine status (e.g., Operational, Under Maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  "maintenance_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance activity (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "technician_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for each technician (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Operator, Engineer, Data Scientist, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department each user belongs to (e.g., production, maintenance, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Operator, Engineer, Data Scientist, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sensor data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the sensor data (e.g., web interface, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of each data version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_classification" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data entry */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., Normal, Anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "classification_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of each classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_classification_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_archives" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archive entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data entry */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was archived */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the archived data */,
  "archive_status" TEXT /* Status of each archived data entry (e.g., available, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_archives_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
